title: I-77 South Alternatives Proposed by Sustain Charlotte
summary: Sustain Charlotte challenges I-77 South project due to impacts on greenways and parks.
charlotte_impact: Highlights community concern over environmental impact of infrastructure projects and promotes alternative solutions.

title: TSA Wait Times May Increase at Charlotte Airport Due to Shutdown
summary: Partial government shutdown could lead to longer TSA wait times; passengers advised to arrive early.

title: NC Adults Can Now Take Driver's Tests at Private Schools

charlotte_impact: Improves accessibility and convenience for obtaining driver's licenses, reducing DMV congestion.
